resolution: Replaced CTE-batched candidate selection with per-aggregate loop using direct WHERE clauses. Verified via EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN: SEARCH event USING INDEX event_aggregate_type_seq_idx (aggregate_id=? AND type=?).
description: SQLite query planner materializes CTE before joining with event table, preventing index pushdown. Per-aggregate queries with direct WHERE aggregate_id=? force SEARCH on event_aggregate_type_seq_idx (aggregate_id=?, type=?). 100x+ speedup for small aggregates.
title: CTE-based batch JOIN causes full-table SCAN instead of index SEARCH

resolution: No action needed. Feature will become useful as the database accumulates history beyond 90 days.
description: All 643,518 events across 720 aggregates are < 90 days old. session_message.time_created check confirms 0 old messages. The compaction feature works correctly but has nothing to compact yet.
title: Production database has 0 age-eligible compaction candidates

description: Stage 6 ran 'tsgo --noEmit' directly instead of via 'bun run typecheck'. The tsgo binary (@typescript/native-preview@7.0.0-dev.20251207.1) is resolved by Bun's package script runner, not installed on system PATH. Lint was skipped because no exact command was recorded in execution logs.
title: Stage 6 typecheck RED: tsgo not on PATH; lint skipped (no recorded command)
resolution: Recorded exact reproducible commands: 'bun run typecheck' (workdir: packages/core) and 'bun run lint -- <files>' (workdir: root). Both use bun's node_modules/.bin resolution. Removed unused AGGREGATE_BATCH_SIZE constant (reduced warnings from 31 to 30). All three quality checks pass: tests 24/0 exit 0, typecheck exit 0, lint 0 errors exit 0.

title: Overclaims corrected: 4.8 activation unverified, 5.4-5.7 plan evidence not exercised, Stage 3 skip unrecorded
description: Validation report identified: (1) Task 4.8 marked complete without skill_find/skill_use activation evidence, (2) Tasks 5.4-5.7 marked N/A without exercising plan acceptance criteria, (3) Stage 3 skip not recorded in metadata. All corrected.
resolution: 4.8 unchecked (skill_find returns 0 matches, skill_use returns not_found — lazy-vault index needs session restart). 5.4-5.7 unchecked (plan evidence not exercised due to 0 candidates). Stage 3 skip recorded in skipped_stages with B+C rationale. Progress corrected from 30/42 to 25/42 (59.5%). 9 new acceptance tests added (33 total, all pass).

resolution: All fixes implemented and tested. 51 tests pass, typecheck clean, lint 0 errors.

description: User-requested configurable cutoffDays option added to Options type
impact: Callers can now specify cutoffDays to use a retention window other than the default 90 days. Default behavior unchanged. Policy fingerprint unchanged (cutoff captured in manifest).
